name: DataTracks XBRL/iXBRL Financial Reporting API
what_it_does: DataTracks XBRL and iXBRL financial reporting REST API for SEC EDGAR filing preparation, European ESEF iXBRL reporting, HMRC iXBRL corporate tax filing, and regulatory financial statement tagging. Enables AI agents to manage XBRL instance document creation from financial statements for SEC 10-K/10-Q EDGAR submission automation, handle iXBRL tagging for European ESEF annual report regulatory filing, access HMRC iXBRL corporate tax return tagging for UK Companies House and HMRC filing, retrieve XBRL taxonomy validation and error reporting for regulatory filing accuracy verification, manage inline XBRL (iXBRL) human-readable report generation for dual-purpose regulatory disclosure, handle XBRL calculation and dimensional data validation for financial consistency checking, access financial statement normalization and tag mapping for cross-period comparability, retrieve SEC EDGAR submission status and acceptance confirmation for filing workflow management, manage multi-period financial tagging for comparative statement filing, and integrate DataTracks with accounting systems (SAP, Oracle, Workday Adaptive) and legal entity management platforms.
use_cases: Filing EDGAR reports from public company compliance agents
Preparing ESEF reports from European regulatory agents
Tagging HMRC returns from UK corporate tax agents
Validating XBRL accuracy from financial reporting agents
not_for: General financial reporting without regulatory XBRL requirement
Real-time financial data streaming or market data
Audit workflow and working paper management
best_when: A public company, large private company, or financial reporting services firm wanting AI agents to automate XBRL/iXBRL tagging, SEC EDGAR filing preparation, ESEF compliance, and HMRC iXBRL corporate tax filing for regulatory financial reporting obligations.
avoid_when: SEC EDGAR FILING ACCURACY AND CFO CERTIFICATION: Automated XBRL-tagged SEC filings prepared via DataTracks API must be reviewed and approved by CFO/controller before EDGAR submission; automated EDGAR submission of AI-tagged financial statements without human review creates material misstatement risk and SEC enforcement exposure under SOX Section 302/906 certification. ESEF TAXONOMY COMPLIANCE FOR EUROPEAN ISSUERS: Automated ESEF iXBRL tagging must use current ESMA taxonomy year and correct extension taxonomy for issuer-specific tags; automated ESEF filing with incorrect taxonomy year or missing mandatory tags creates European securities regulator rejection and potential non-compliance notification. HMRC IXBRL SUBMISSION TIMING: Automated HMRC iXBRL corporate tax return submission must align with UK corporation tax filing deadline (12 months after period end); automated late submission without extension creates HMRC penalty. XBRL TAXONOMY VERSION MANAGEMENT: XBRL taxonomies (US-GAAP, IFRS, ESEF) are updated annually; automated tagging must use the taxonomy version applicable to the filing period; automated use of prior-year taxonomy for current-year filing creates validation errors and regulatory rejection.

auth.notes: DataTracks uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON/XML. Chennai, India HQ (global offices in US, UK, Singapore, Europe). Founded 2005. Private company. XBRL and regulatory financial reporting services for public companies, financial institutions, and professional services firms. SEC EDGAR, European ESEF, HMRC iXBRL, MAS, FFIEC filing support. Competes with Workiva, Donnelley Financial Solutions (DFIN), and Toppan Merrill for XBRL regulatory filing services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-filing or volume subscription pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-filing or annual subscription by volume and regulatory jurisdiction
pricing.notes: Chennai India / global offices. Private company, founded 2005. Per-filing or annual subscription. SEC EDGAR, ESEF, HMRC iXBRL, MAS filing support.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; XBRL generation processing time varies by document complexity

known_agent_gotchas: XBRL TAXONOMY VERSION MUST MATCH FILING PERIOD: Automated XBRL tagging must use the taxonomy version applicable to the specific filing period (US-GAAP 2023, 2024; IFRS 2023, 2024; ESEF 2022, 2023); automated use of prior-year taxonomy for current filing year creates validation errors and SEC/ESMA rejection; implement taxonomy-year selection logic in automated tagging workflow

SEC EDGAR CFO REVIEW AND CERTIFICATION MANDATORY: Automated XBRL-tagged 10-K/10-Q filing prepared via DataTracks must be reviewed by CFO and legal before EDGAR submission; automated EDGAR filing without certification review creates SOX Section 302/906 certification exposure for material misstatement

ASYNC XBRL GENERATION FOR COMPLEX DOCUMENTS: DataTracks XBRL instance document generation for complex multi-entity consolidated financials can take minutes; automated agents must implement async status polling or webhook callback; synchronous blocking calls for large filing documents will timeout

ESEF EXTENSION TAXONOMY FOR CUSTOM LINE ITEMS: ESEF iXBRL filing for European issuers requires issuer-specific extension taxonomy for financial line items not in ESMA core taxonomy; automated ESEF tagging without proper extension taxonomy definition creates ESMA filing validation rejection

NO WEBHOOKS — FILING STATUS REQUIRES POLLING: DataTracks does not support native webhooks for filing completion or validation status; automated filing workflow must implement polling for XBRL generation and validation completion

Human review mandatory for all regulatory submissions — XBRL/iXBRL regulatory filings affect public company disclosure obligations; automated DataTracks-generated filings must include human financial reporting expert review before any regulatory submission; automated filing without review creates regulatory and legal risk
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial regulatory reporting. SOC2, ISO27001. API key. US/EU/UK/SG. Public company financial statement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial regulatory reporting. SOC2, ISO27001. API key. Global. Public company financial disclosure data.
